name: @territory/mcp-ia-server
description: MCP server exposing Territory Developer IA docs (specs, rules, root markdown).

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/parser/*.test.ts tests/tools/*.test.ts tests/ia-index/*.test.ts tests/schemas/*.test.ts tests/ia-db/*.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: node --import tsx --test --watch tests/parser/*.test.ts tests/tools/*.test.ts tests/ia-index/*.test.ts tests/schemas/*.test.ts tests/ia-db/*.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --src src --include 'src/parser/**/*.ts' --include 'src/ia-index/**/*.ts' --exclude '**/*.test.ts' --check-coverage --lines 90 --reporter text node --import tsx --test tests/parser/*.test.ts tests/tools/*.test.ts tests/ia-index/*.test.ts tests/schemas/*.test.ts tests/ia-db/*.test.ts
